name: Gara
description: Enemies are made fragile by Gara’s deadly touch. Gara’s vitric abilities provide her and her allies with survivability and deal high damage. Shatter the foe.
passiveDescription: A chance to create a radial blind lasting |DURATION|s when Gara casts Abilities.

abilities.name: Shattered Lash
abilities.description: Lash out with stream of shattered glass, or hold for an arcing strike. Stats are boosted by the equipped mods on Shattered Lash.

abilities.name: Splinter Storm
abilities.description: Gara's armor splinters into a maelstrom of shattered glass. Allies who contact the cloud are fortified against damage.

abilities.name: Spectrorage
abilities.description: Trap enemies in a carousel of mirrors, forcing them to attack visions of their true selves. Destroyed mirrors damage their attackers, as does the collapse of the carousel.

abilities.name: Mass Vitrify
abilities.description: Create an expanding ring of molten glass that slowly crystallizes enemies who enter. When the expansion is complete, the ring hardens to block weapons fire. The ring draws extra strength from the health and shields of crystallized enemies. Use Shattered Lash to smash the ring and send razor-sharp glass flying.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Enemies are made fragile by Gara’s deadly touch. Gara’s vitric abilities provide her and her allies with survivability and deal high damage. Shatter the foe.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Gara Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Gara Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Gara Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
Continue the legend of the glass-armored warrior Gara. Dominate the battlefield with the power and purity of crystal.
Loose explosive glass slugs that tear through enemies with Gara’s signature shotgun. Presented here in its spectacular Prime form.
The glorious original Orokin casting of Gara’s signature glass hammer. Deceptively light and swift, while remaining lethally effective.
Get the newest Prime gear with Gara Prime Access and Prime Accessories here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access
PLUS! As an added Gara QoL change, her glass armor no longer disappears during Splinter Storm!
You have requested many times (many, many, times) to have a UI toggle that will give you control over whether Gara's glass armor parts will "shatter" while using Splinter Storm. You want to use this power all the time, but it makes your warframe look so much less... shiny when you do.
We hope this change will be appealing to everybody living on the cutting edge of Gara fashion.
Also added a dual wield custom HUD offset handling for Atlas, Gara, and Saryn.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gara’s Mass Vitrify ability description incorrectly showing the Heat damage icon for its Explosion Damage. It will now correctly show the Puncture, Slash, and Impact icons as intended.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ‘Fist’ type weapons appearing invisible while Gara is equipped with the Kaleida Skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
Deimos Arcana includes a new Deluxe Skin for Gara, as well as a new Syandana and Longsword skin! Bathe your weapons in glass and watch your enemies shatter at your style!
Decorated in sharp glass, and striking a powerful pose, The Gara Kaleida Deluxe skin comes with a whole new look for this beautiful Warframe.
Panes of polished glass complete this elegant Syandana. Like Gara herself, it is less fragile than it looks.
Bedazzle with Gara Kaleida's auxiliary back pieces.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Gara Shattered Lash

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
Our Healing AoE / Damage Reduction changes posted back on April 3rd have arrived! If you’re unfamiliar, ultimately what we want is more ‘Healing’ Abilities to work to allow for more strategies to emerge in various mission types. Healing these objectives can serve well as an alternative or a complement to the commonly used defensive Abilities, such as Frost's Snow Globe, Gara's Mass Vitrify, Limbo's Cataclysm. 100% heals is not what we want to do, so we are instead allowing the effects with some objective-specific adjustments as to not trivialize the game modes.
Gara 
Gara

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.8.0 + 23.8.0.1 + 23.8.0.2
patchlogs.fixes:
(Brief aside: as a Nezha main, I was originally skeptical of the 90% damage resistance change, and I suspect many readers will be skeptical too. However, playing the rework myself quickly changed my mind. The various buffs really outweigh the negatives, making Nezha much more capable in a supporting crowd-controller role. If you doubt just how potent 90% damage resistance can be, try out Gara’s Splinter Storm at 130% or more power strength!)
Fixed Gara’s Mass Vitrify blocking Revenant’s Danse Macabre lasers.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed crash that could occur on recasting Gara’s Mass Vitrify if the ability was terminated before all the ring pieces could be created. 
Fixed rare script error with Gara’s Mass Vitrify.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Gara is still relatively new as far as Warframes are concerned but since her release, we’ve found (and many players have found) that an invulnerable and almost impenetrable barrier doesn’t allow for a very engaging gameplay experience. We know that other Warframes also have Powers with similar issues, but adding a shattering component to Mass Vitrify is a change we could easily implement that is consistent with Gara’s glass theme while also making Mass Vitrify more interactive.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a Simulacrum Arsenal crash caused by Gara's passive.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Broca Syandana clipping through Gara’s legs.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.1.1
patchlogs.fixes:

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0

Fixed Ignis (and similar weapons) being able to damage friendly Gara's Spectrorage mirrors.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.7

Fixed Gara’s Spectrorage nullifier checks being too high.
Further fixes for Gara’s Mass Vitrify not being properly dispelled by nullifiers.
Fixed Gara’s glass armor appearing to fade in every time a new cosmetic option is chosen in the arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Corpus Nullifiers not destroying Gara’s Mass Vitrify and causing it to double up next time it is cast as seen here:
Fixed Sigils flickering when equipped on Gara.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.2
patchlogs.changes:
Replaced Gara’s Blueprint requirement of Kuva with Orokin Cells.
Gara’s Shattered Lash no longer knocks down in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Gara’s Mass Vitrify completely freezing bosses in glass.
Fixed Gara having no description for her Passive.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.additions:
Blast enemies with glass slugs that devastate on impact. This is Gara’s signature weapon. Find it and its blueprint in the Market today!
Silently lacerate enemies with Gara’s signature glass throwing knives. Find it and its blueprint in the Market today!
Tear and maim with this agile, lightweight glass hammer. Gara’s signature melee weapon. Find it and its blueprint in the Market today!
